specSummary: 6-phase implementation: 1) Core infra (config, aliases, HF integration, pull/ls/rm CLI), 2) Daemon & API (FastAPI server, OpenAI endpoints, hot-swap), 3) Idle management (timer, memory cleanup), 4) launchd integration (plist, daemon commands), 5) Interactive chat (REPL), 6) Docs & release. Embeds MLX-VLM as library for full model lifecycle control.
